audit_status.source_base: Greek Revelation text tradition with Israel-tribe and multitude imagery; draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for sealing, twelve tribes, great multitude, Lamb shepherding.

verses.restored: After this I saw four messengers standing at four corners of earth, holding four winds of earth so no wind might blow on earth or sea or any tree.
And I saw another messenger ascending from sunrise, having seal of living Divine, crying to the four messengers to whom it was given to harm earth and sea,
saying: Do not harm earth or sea or trees until we seal servants of our Divine upon their foreheads.
And I heard the number of those sealed: one hundred forty-four thousand sealed from every tribe of sons of Israel.
From Judah twelve thousand sealed; Reuben twelve thousand; Gad twelve thousand;
Asher twelve thousand; Naphtali twelve thousand; Manasseh twelve thousand;
Simeon twelve thousand; Levi twelve thousand; Issachar twelve thousand;
Zebulun twelve thousand; Joseph twelve thousand; Benjamin twelve thousand sealed.

After these things I saw, and look, a great multitude no one could number, from every nation and tribes and peoples and tongues, standing before throne and before Lamb, clothed in white robes and palms in their hands.
They cry with great voice: Salvation/healing belongs to our Divine sitting on throne and to the Lamb.
All messengers stood around throne and elders and four living creatures, and fell before throne on their faces and worshiped the Divine,
saying: Amen. Blessing and glory and wisdom and thanksgiving and honor and power and strength to our Divine into ages of ages. Amen.
One of elders answered, saying to me: These clothed in white robes, who are they and from where did they come?
I said to him: My lord, you know. And he said: These are the ones coming out of great pressure; they washed their robes and made them white in blood/life of the Lamb.
Because of this they are before throne of Divine and serve him day and night in his temple, and the One sitting on throne will shelter them.
They will hunger no more, nor thirst anymore; sun will not strike them, nor any scorching heat,
because the Lamb in midst of throne will shepherd them and guide them to springs of waters of life, and the Divine will wipe away every tear from their eyes.

translation_notes: Israel-tribe sealing and multi-nation multitude are both preserved; do not erase either Israel or nations.
Great pressure is not glorified; it ends in shelter, shepherding, water of life, and tears wiped away.
safety_note: Do not racialize or weaponize the 144,000; the number is apocalyptic symbolic completeness tied to Israel imagery and followed by innumerable multitude.
